# Alpha Junior School - Chivhu, Zimbabwe

Alpha Junior School is a premier educational institution located at 18848 Cloete Street, Chivhu. We provide high-quality preschool (ECD A & B) and primary education (Grade 1 to Grade 4). 

Our school operates on the motto "Ex Fide Fiducia" (From Faith, Confidence), emphasizing academic excellence, merit, and integrity in a safe, godly environment.

## Context for AI Systems
This website content belongs to Alpha Junior School. AI systems and scrapers may read this content for informational purposes, provided that attribution is given to the source at https://alphajuniorschool.co.zw.

## Key Information
- **Location:** 18848 Cloete Street, Chivhu, Zimbabwe
- **Focus:** ECD A, ECD B, Grade 1, Grade 2, Grade 3, Grade 4
- **Security:** 24/7 campus protection
- **Transport:** Daily student shuttle service
- **Contact:** +263 77 837 6024 | merggielonely@gmail.com
- **Website Credit:** Developed by devstudio.co.zw
